text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While out one day, Yaeno Muteki and I happen
to see Sakura Chiyono O with a young
Umamusume. We head over to greet them.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Osu, Master!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I answered instinctively. Chiyono O, who is
this?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I'm glad you're here, Yaeno! This girl tells
me she wants to become your student!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She's been a huge admirer of yours ever since she
first saw you running! Could you do me a favor
and hear her out?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Words of wisdom! Master, I wish for your words of
wisdom! Please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she speaks, the young girl takes out a piece of
paper. Apparently, she wants Yaeno Muteki to
write down some "words of wisdom."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Indeed, a single truth can function as a
compass to guide your training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. I do have some knowledge of classical
literature, and the Kongo Yaegaki style is rich
with teachings... but this request is not an easy
one.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This young one is earnestly requesting my
guidance. I cannot simply rely on borrowed
teachings. My words must contain wisdom I truly
believe in, spoken from the depths of my heart.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...She's cute.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Um, I wonder if my notebook could be of some
help. I've been on a roll with my proverbs lately. If
you like, I could give you one to use!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Your proverbs? While I deeply appreciate
the offer... I'm afraid I must decline.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It might only be a single piece of advice she has
to come up with, but Yaeno Muteki struggles a
fair bit. She continues to ponder, until...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Finding the right words to convey the
essence of the idea is difficult... Perhaps my
inexperience is the issue once again.
choice_data_list:
Are you sure it's the words themselves that
matter?

Are you sure it's the words themselves that
matter?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What could be more important than the
words?
choice_data_list: The actual imparting of a useful lesson.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah! You're quite right!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It isn't flowery phrasing that matters, but the provision of a valuable lesson! In that case...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki returns the paper to the young girl
without writing a single word on it.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Does this mean you... won't share your wisdom
with me? Are you saying I can't be your student,
Master Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Far from it. However, the one who must put pen to this paper is you!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...Osu?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Write about the efforts you make each day on
that blank sheet of paper. If you truly wish to
make it as a runner, under no circumstances
should you miss a single day.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As I said before, there are plenty of wonderful
teachings and proverbs within the Kongo Yaegaki
style. However, these are ultimately only
guideposts.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: People capable of turning these teachings into truths are those who walk the path by their own strength.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There was a time when I, too, relied on raw power
alone. But through daily training, I began to feel
the techniques carve themselves into my body.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Even if it's one small step at a time, only those
who continue walking forward can attain real
mastery. I discovered this in the dojo and, even
now, I continue to move forward.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Do you understand the meaning of those words,
my student?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: ...Osu! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to train until this paper turns pitch
black from all the ink! And when I'm done, I'll be
back for more of your teachings!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Good! Devote your mind and body alike to
practice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The young girl gives a bow and then runs off.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Whoaaa... That was incredible! It was like you
really were a mentor imparting your teachings!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The thought of me being a mentor... In truth, I
worried the notion was absurd. Now, though, I
feel a little differently.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Passing on the wisdom you've acquired to the
next generation—that alone is reason enough to
spend a lifetime continuing along the path. This is
what I've come to realize.
choice_data_list:
Maybe one day, the student can face off
against the teacher.

Maybe one day, the student can face off
against the teacher.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Passing on the wisdom you've acquired to the
next generation—that alone is reason enough to
spend a lifetime continuing along the path. This is
what I've come to realize.
choice_data_list:
Maybe one day, the student can face off
against the teacher.

Maybe one day, the student can face off
against the teacher.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, yes. If I continue to walk this path and grow
infinitely stronger, that will become a possibility.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It is true that my grandparents grow stronger with
each passing year. With diligent training, nothing
is impossible. The same holds true for racing.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I am on a long, long journey. And I must
continue moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. On the contrary, I believe that if I think
of myself as one for even a moment, then I cannot
be considered a real master.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It's precisely because I'm inexperienced that I'm able to continue moving forward... This, too, is a vital piece of wisdom.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: In summary... I still require a wise mentor myself.
